result.markdown:
--- title: "Parcel time series from an atlas" subtitle: "Mean BOLD per parcel as a typed clustered vector." jupyter: python3 sidebar: cookbook --- ## Goal Reduce a 4-D BOLD to one mean time series per atlas parcel, with the parcellation's spatial frame validated against the BOLD's, and the result carrying provenance. ## Code ::: {#a6cadf48 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} from pathlib import Path import sys sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd().parents[1] / "src")) import numpy as np import neuroim as ni repo = Path.cwd().parents[1] if Path.cwd().name == "cookbook" else Path.cwd() bold = ni.read_image(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_bold.nii.gz")) mask = ni.read_image(str(repo / "golden_tests/fixtures/tiny_mask.nii.gz"), type="vol") # A 3-parcel label volume in the mask's frame (stand-in for an atlas). m = np.asarray(mask.data).astype(int) labels = np.zeros_like(m) for n, (i, j, k) in enumerate(np.argwhere(m > 0)): labels[i, j, k] = (n % 3) + 1 atlas = ni.DenseNeuroVol(labels.astype(np.int16), mask.space) clustered = bold.parcel_means(atlas) (type(clustered).__name__, np.asarray(clustered.ts).shape, # (n_timepoints, n_parcels) clustered.n_clusters, clustered.provenance.method_name) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=1} ``` ('ClusteredNeuroVec', (10, 3), 3, 'parcel_means') ``` ::: ::: `parcel_means` accepts a label `DenseNeuroVol` (or a typed `neuroim.atlas.VolumetricAtlas`) and returns a `ClusteredNeuroVec`. ## What's guaranteed - The atlas/BOLD spatial frame is checked at the API surface before any reduction — `parcel_means` routes through the same `verify.assert_same_space` gate as `series_roi`. - `.ts` is time-major `(n_timepoints, n_parcels)`; `.n_clusters` and `.space` travel with it; `.provenance` records the reduction. ## What survives the file `ClusteredNeuroVec.provenance` is a `Receipt`. Projecting a parcel statistic back to a volume (`map_to_volume()` on a derived `ParcelEffectResult`) yields a `DenseNeuroVol` whose Receipt embeds on `to_nibabel()`. ## Trapdoors ::: {#0fe812d9 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} from neuroim.neuro_space import NeuroSpace wrong = NeuroSpace(tuple(mask.space.dim), spacing=(9, 9, 9)) bold.parcel_means(ni.DenseNeuroVol(labels.astype(np.int16), wrong)) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-error} ::: {.ansi-escaped-output} ```{=html}

``` ::: ::: ::: A parcellation whose affine disagrees with the BOLD raises `ValueError` containing `spatial contract mismatch` — the same leaf refusal every spatial operation bottoms out in. ## See also - [Concept: Atlas](../concepts/atlas.qmd) - [Concept: Contract failures](../concepts/contract-failures.qmd) - [Evidence](../evidence/index.qmd) — runnable atlas and parcel workflows.
